info.title: Locations Service API
info.description: The Web API for managing locations in SmartAccess ecosystem

get.description: Returns a Building identified by its id

put.description: Updates an existing Building identified by its id

delete.description: Deletes an existing Building identified by its id

post.description: Registers a new building in the system
Assigns rooms to an existing Building identified by its id
Removes rooms from an existing Building identified by its id

get.description: Returns a Parking identified by its id

put.description: Updates an existing Parking identified by its id

delete.description: Deletes an existing Parking identified by its id

post.description: Registers a new parking in the system

get.description: Returns a Room identified by its id

put.description: Updates an existing Room identified by its id

delete.description: Deletes an existing Room identified by its id

post.description: Registers a new room in the system

get.summary: Get a list of rooms in remote provider
get.description: Returns a paged collection of rooms searching the remote provider
Returns an Site identified by its id

put.description: Updates an existing Site identified by its id

delete.description: Deletes an existing Site identified by its id

post.description: Registers a new site in the system
Assigns buildings to an existing Site identified by its id
Removes buildings from an existing Site identified by its id
